description.value: GPX Diamonds is a premier jewelry store based in New Delhi, India, specializing in exquisite lab-grown diamonds. They offer a stunning collection of IGI-certified diamonds in various cuts, colors, and clarities, including vibrant fancy pinks, intense blues, and vivid yellows. With a perfect 5-star rating from numerous customers, GPX Diamonds is dedicated to providing high-quality, ethically sourced alternatives for discerning clientele.

address.value: Basement,B-273, Block B, Chittaranjan Park,New Delhi, Delhi 110019,India

bio.value: GPX Diamonds is designed for jewelers. Check out our website, you might find the diamonds you're looking for and really like.

media_assets.product_name: 1.56 CT Oval F / VS1 Lab Grown Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single oval-shaped diamond held by black-tipped tweezers against a plain grey background. The diamond exhibits strong brilliance and fire, appearing colorless with no visible inclusions. Its facets reflect light brightly, indicating good cut quality.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A brilliant oval-cut loose diamond held by black tweezers against a plain grey background, showcasing its colorless appearance.

media_assets.product_name: 1.51 Carat Intense Blue Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, SI1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut diamond with a vibrant blue hue. Its rectangular shape features step-cut facets that create parallel lines and geometric patterns, reflecting light within the stone. Small, dark inclusions are visible upon close inspection, particularly along the edges and within the facets, against a plain, light grey studio background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant blue emerald-cut loose diamond, showcasing its step-cut facets and rectangular shape against a grey background.

media_assets.product_name: Radiant cut 1.40 Ct Vivid Blue Lab Grown Diamond VS1 quality
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose radiant cut diamond. It exhibits a vibrant, deep blue color with excellent brilliance and fire, showcasing numerous facets. The diamond appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions, presented against a plain, light grey studio background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant, loose radiant cut blue diamond, showcasing its brilliant facets and deep color against a plain grey background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.14 Carat Vivid Blue Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, VS1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut gemstone with a vibrant blue hue. Its rectangular shape features stepped facets that create parallel lines and geometric reflections, indicating a high-quality cut. The stone appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions, presented against a plain, neutral grey background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vivid blue, loose emerald-cut diamond with brilliant facets, presented against a plain grey background.

media_assets.product_name: 3.01Ct Intense Pink Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, VS1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut diamond with a distinct fancy pink color. Its step-cut facets create parallel lines and geometric reflections, showcasing its clarity and brilliance. The diamond is presented against a plain, solid gray background, emphasizing the stone itself.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A large, loose emerald-cut diamond with a vibrant fancy pink color, showcasing its step facets on a gray background.

media_assets.product_name: Special 4.10 carat radiant diamond H, VS1 Lab Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: A close-up, top-down studio shot of a single, loose radiant cut diamond. The diamond exhibits strong brilliance and fire, with numerous facets reflecting light in a complex pattern. It appears colorless to near-colorless and eye-clean, presented against a pure white background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A brilliant, eye-clean radiant cut diamond, appearing colorless, photographed from above against a pure white background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.55 Carat VS1 Clarity Pear Shape Vivid Yellow Lab Grown Diamond

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The diamond is positioned upright, likely on a clear or minimal stand, to showcase its full form.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, pear-shaped diamond with a vibrant yellow hue. Its highly faceted surface reflects light, showcasing numerous brilliant flashes. The diamond appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions, presented against a plain, light grey studio background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant, pear-shaped fancy vivid yellow loose diamond, highly faceted and sparkling, against a plain light background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.13 carat Emerald step cut diamond | Vivid Pink Diamond

visual_features.presentation: studio shot / grey background / held by tweezers

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald step-cut diamond held by black tweezers against a plain grey background. The diamond exhibits a distinct pink hue with strong saturation, showing clear facets and internal reflections. Its clarity appears high, with no visible inclusions, and the overall presentation is clean and professional.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vivid pink emerald step-cut diamond held by black tweezers against a grey background, showcasing its facets and color.

media_assets.product_name: Pear-Cut Crystal Flower Dainty Necklace in 14k/18k Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: multiple stones, flower cluster design, dainty chain

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a dainty gold necklace featuring a central curved bar adorned with multiple sparkling gemstones. The gemstones are primarily pear-cut, arranged in clusters to form three distinct flower-like motifs, each with a round brilliant cut stone at its center. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its intricate design and brilliant appearance.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Dainty gold necklace with a curved bar featuring three flower clusters made of pear and round brilliant cut gemstones.

media_assets.product_name: Multi-Round Diamond Necklace Crafted in Hallmarked Gold – Everyday Elegance

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Five circular diamond cluster motifs, pave/halo setting.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a delicate gold necklace featuring five circular diamond-set motifs arranged in a gentle curve. Each motif consists of a central cluster of small, round diamonds surrounded by a halo of even smaller, round diamonds, all set in yellow gold. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its sparkle and intricate design.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Gold necklace with five sparkling circular diamond cluster motifs, each featuring a central diamond cluster and a halo.

media_assets.product_name: Timeless Trio Diamond Halo Pendant Necklace in Hallmarked 14K/18K Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Three main stones (one round, two pear) with pave diamond halos, attached to a delicate chain.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a gold necklace with a central pendant featuring three diamond clusters. The central cluster is a round brilliant diamond surrounded by a halo of smaller diamonds, flanked by two pear-shaped diamonds, each also surrounded by a halo of smaller diamonds. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its intricate design and sparkling stones.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Gold necklace with a central round diamond halo pendant flanked by two pear-shaped diamond halo pendants on a white background.

media_assets.product_name: Halo Round Diamond Necklace in Hallmarked Gold | Gift-Ready Jewellery

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Seven round brilliant stones are clustered to form a flower-like pendant.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a delicate gold necklace with a flower-shaped diamond cluster pendant, centered against a clean white background. The pendant features seven round brilliant cut stones, prong-set to form a symmetrical floral design. The thin chain is a classic link style, complementing the elegant pendant.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A delicate gold necklace with a flower-shaped pendant featuring seven sparkling round brilliant diamonds on a white background.

media_assets.product_name: Princess and Pear Cut Diamond Earrings in Hallmarked Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Two hoop earrings, alternating pear and princess cut diamonds.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of yellow gold hoop earrings, each adorned with an alternating pattern of pear-cut and princess-cut diamonds. The diamonds appear colorless and eye-clean, set in a polished yellow gold mounting against a clean white background. The earrings are presented at an angle, showcasing their full design and sparkle.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of yellow gold hoop earrings featuring alternating pear and princess cut diamonds, sparkling against a white background.

specifications.gold_color_options: Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold

social_source.caption:
This is a beautiful diamond ring with a 2 carat pear-shaped diamond in the center. The center diamond is IGI certified, which means it has been checked and approved by a trusted gem experts' group.

The ring is made of gold, and you can choose from three different types of gold:

14k gold
18k gold
22k gold
You can also choose from three colors of gold:

Yellow Gold
White Gold
Rose Gold
No matter which type or color of gold you choose, we guarantee that it is pure. The gold has been checked and approved by a trusted third-party group.

The ring also has small side diamonds. These diamonds are between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat each. They add extra sparkle to the ring.

In summary:

The ring has a 2 carat pear-shaped center diamond.
The center diamond is IGI certified.
You can choose from 14k, 18k, or 22k gold.
The gold can be yellow, white, or rose.
The gold is guaranteed pure and certified by a third-party.
The ring has small side diamonds between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat.
This ring is perfect for anyone who loves diamonds and wants a beautiful, certified piece of jewelry.

Welcome to the dazzling world of GPX Diamonds! 🌟✨

In this exclusive Diamonds Showcase, we invite you to explore the brilliance and craftsmanship that define GPX Diamonds. 💎 Discover a mesmerizing collection of exquisite diamonds, each meticulously curated to radiate elegance and luxury.

🔍 What to expect in this showcase:
✅ Stunning Diamond Cuts: From classic round brilliants to unique and rare cuts, witness the artistry behind our diverse diamond shapes.

✨ Exceptional Quality: GPX Diamonds is synonymous with uncompromising quality. Learn about the 4 Cs – cut, color, clarity, and carat weight – and how they contribute to the breathtaking beauty of our diamonds.

🛍️ Shopping Guide: Whether you're a seasoned diamond enthusiast or a first-time buyer, our showcase includes valuable tips and insights to guide you through the process of selecting the perfect diamond for any occasion.

🌈 Customization Options: Explore the endless possibilities of creating a one-of-a-kind piece. Our experts will walk you through customization options to help you design a jewelry piece that reflects your unique style.

📈 Industry Trends: Stay ahead of the curve with insights into the latest diamond trends and innovations in the jewelry industry.

Join us on this sparkling journey through the world of GPX Diamonds! Don't miss the chance to witness the timeless beauty and unmatched brilliance that define our exceptional diamond creations. Like, subscribe, and share to stay connected with the latest in the world of luxury diamonds. 💖✨ #GPXDiamonds #DiamondShowcase #LuxuryJewelry

reviews.author: Suraj Kumar
reviews.text: I recently purchased a pair of diamonds and couldn't be happier with my experience! The quality is exceptional brilliant sparkle, perfect cut, and exactly as described. The pricing was unbeatable for such high quality stones, and the service was smooth and professional from start to finish. Highly recommended for anyone looking for genuine diamonds at great value. Will definitely be shopping again. 👍🏻

reviews.author: Chandhra KV
reviews.text: I am really amazed with the diamond and the craftmen work. I was initially skeptical to buy expensive diamonds online. But Mr. Nipun Bakshi is really amazing person who helped in understading the authenticity and quality of work they do. Most interesting is transparent communication on the making process. Happy to own 7.01 carat Diamond at amazing price. Absolute brilliant!!!

reviews.author: Abeer Banerjee
reviews.text: GPX Diamonds, especially Nipun knows the art of winning customer trust. Right from the beginning he made me comfortable in buying online after asking him multiple queries. Post sale, also his customer service was top notch. His knowledge and skills answered my doubts and helped me establish trust and integrity with GPX Diamonds. He also provided good discount considering both, the availability of a better piece and customer satisfaction.
reviews.owner_response:
Thank you so much sir 🙏 
For your precious feedback.

reviews.author: Vishal kumar
reviews.text: I love my new ring! The oval diamond is so shiny and beautiful. The eternity band makes it look extra special. It fits my finger perfectly. The ring was packed nicely and came on time. I am very happy with my purchase. Thank you for this lovely ring
reviews.owner_response: Thanks a lot for the valuable feed back! We really appreciate it!

reviews.text: I bought a ring from Nipun and I really like the craftsmanship and his fair dealing. He is very transparent in his dealing and the final product was very good. He guided me well with different diamond cut and clarity.

reviews.author: Rhema John
reviews.text: I was initially hesitant about this purchase, but as soon as the item arrived and I opened the package, I was amazed by the uniqueness and beauty of the diamond. It came in the original IGI-certified packaging, which added to my confidence. This diamond is absolutely perfect for my ring and would look stunning in any piece of jewelry. I'm giving 5 stars for my first order and experience with GPX Diamonds. Thank you!

social_profiles.bio:
GPX Diamonds is a highly reputed diamond seller in the world, known for its exceptional quality, unparalleled craftsmanship, and outstanding customer service. With a commitment to excellence and a passion for diamonds, GPX Diamonds has become a trusted name in the diamond industry, catering to customers from all over the world.

Overall, GPX Diamonds is a highly respected and reputable diamond seller in Delhi NCR, India, known for its exceptional quality, outstanding customer service, and commitment to sustainability and ethical practices. Whether you are looking for a diamond engagement ring, a special piece of jewelry, or simply want to invest in a beautiful and valuable diamond, GPX Diamonds is the perfect choice.
